_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: To integrate the five data sets, we calculated a score for each gene in each experiment...The final MPNST vs. NF gene signature contained 579 unique ENSEMBL human genes
details: Successfully used for differential expression analysis and meta-analysis to integrate five microarray studies and generate MPNST vs. NF gene signature with 579 unique genes
